pages.title: Rum Pon Gold
pages.tagline: Sweat the riddim in this smoky Brooklyn-to-Kingston fusion.

pages.body: Step into a club where air is thick and heat rises off polished gold. The male DJ trades fire with the female vocalist, their call-and-response chants echoing through a room filled with smoke and rhythm. This track blends dirty analog drums with punchy boom-bap kicks, creating an intimate yet sweaty atmosphere perfect for non-stop dancing. Feel the deep rolling sub bass thumping beneath skanking guitar chops and sharp piano stabs. As brass hits crash against organ bubbles, you'll move your waist to a groove that refuses to fade. Whether pouring more water or proving yourself bad in this intense environment, every second is pure intoxicating energy.
pages.styleSentence: A high-energy Brooklyn-meets-Kingston dancehall banger running at 172 BPM featuring dirty analog drums with a punchy boom-bap kick layer, deep rolling sub bass, skanking guitar chops, sharp piano stabs, organ bubbles, brass hits, record scratches, and vinyl warmth that creates an intimate yet sweaty nightclub atmosphere.

pages.text:
[DJ Intro]
Yo
Gold cup crew
Smoke room massive
Brooklyn to Kingston
Run it

[Beat In]

[Male DJ]
Rum pon gold

[Female]
Wine pon me

[Male DJ]
Smoke inna air

[Female]
Come find me

[Male DJ]
Rum pon gold

[Female]
Move that waist

[Male DJ]
Pull up the riddim

[Female]
Don’t waste taste

[Drop]

[Hook - Call and Response]
Rum pon gold

Gold inna cup

Smoke don’t fold

Turn it up

Body too bold

Wine it slow

Night getting hot

Don’t let go

[Female]
Wine pon me
Wine pon me
If you bad, come prove it

[Male DJ]
Easy now
Easy now
Don’t stop, girl, move it

[Post-Hook]
Left side
Bubble

Right side
Trouble

Front row
Sweating

Back row
Double

[Verse - Male DJ]
Red cup tilt when the bassline knock
Gold chain swing when the waistline drop
Room full smoke, and the door stay locked
DJ pull it back when the whole place rock

Brooklyn hot

[Female]
Kingston hotter

[Male DJ]
Who bring fire?

[Female]
We bring proper

[Male DJ]
Who got rum?

[Female]
Pour more water

[Male DJ]
Who bad bad?

[Female]
Don’t ask, father

[Hook]
Rum pon gold

Gold inna cup

Smoke don’t fold

Turn it up

Body too bold

Wine it slow

Night getting hot

Don’t let go

[Breakdown]
One time

[Female]
Wine pon me

[Male DJ]
Two time

[Female]
Wine pon me

[Male DJ]
Three time

[Female]
Don’t watch me

[Male DJ]
Four time

[Both]
Pull up, pull up

[Instrumental Riddim Break]
Hey
Hey
Hey
Forward

[Female Lead]
Don’t spill the drink
Light another one
DJ nah done
Morning never come

Hands on my waist
But don’t move dumb
If you can’t keep time
Then you can’t get none

[Male DJ]
Talk to dem

[Female]
I like it rough
But smooth with the timing
Gold on the skin
Bassline climbing

Smoke in my hair
Rum in the lighting
If I say pull up
You better rewind it

[Hook]
Rum pon gold

Gold inna cup

Smoke don’t fold

Turn it up

Body too bold

Wine it slow

Night getting hot

Don’t let go

[Final Chant]
Rum pon gold
Rum pon gold

Wine pon me
Wine pon me

Smoke inna air
Smoke inna air

Pull up again
Pull up again

[Outro - DJ Friendly]
Gold cup
Smoke room

Bassline
Boom boom

Brooklyn
Kingston

Run it
Run it

pages.vocalStyle: male ragga deejay trading call-and-response chants with a sexy female dancehall vocalist

members.name: LEAD VOX
members.bio: Trades fiery call-and-response chants that heat the room up fast.

members.name: DRUMS
members.bio: Keeps the floor shaking. Never misses a downbeat.

members.name: TEXTURES
members.bio: Everything you feel but can't name.
